name: poker-lite
description: Texas Hold'em Poker — browser game with bot AI, bundled for static hosting

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp public/* dist/ && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --minify --sourcemap --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/bundle.js
scripts.dev: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp public/* dist/ && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --sourcemap --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/bundle.js --serve=8080 --servedir=dist
